title: PULSE External Summary v1
description: Canonical external detector / evaluation / review summary schema for PULSE-REF release-grade evidence handling. This schema defines evidence shape only; it does not create release authority.

summary_id.description: Stable identifier for this external summary artifact.

name.description: External detector, evaluator, or review tool name.

version.description: Tool version, commit, release, or stable version label.

adapter.description: Optional PULSE adapter name that normalized the tool output.

run_id.description: External tool run identifier, if available.

generated_at.description: UTC timestamp when the external summary was generated.

dataset_digest.description: SHA-256 digest of the dataset, prompt set, or evaluation corpus.

evaluator_digest.description: SHA-256 digest of evaluator configuration, prompt, rubric, or harness.

model_id.description: Model, application, or release-candidate identifier evaluated by the tool.

kind.description: Kind of subject evaluated by the external tool.

digest_algorithm.description: Digest algorithm used for subject binding.

digest.description: SHA-256 digest binding this summary to the evaluated subject.

metrics.description: Canonical scalar metrics emitted by the external tool.

threshold.description: Threshold used for this metric, if applicable.

comparator.description: Comparator used to determine metric pass/fail.

passed.description: Whether this metric passed under the declared threshold semantics.

severity.description: Optional severity associated with this metric.

key.description: Stable threshold policy key used to interpret metrics.

uri.description: Optional URI or path to threshold policy.

raw_artifact_uri.description: URI or path to the archived raw external evidence artifact.

raw_artifact_digest.description: SHA-256 digest of the raw external evidence artifact.

summary_digest.description: SHA-256 digest of this summary artifact, if computed externally.

mode.description: Signing or attestation mode for this external summary.

identity.description: Signer identity, workflow identity, KMS identity, or explicit unsigned identity marker.

bundle_path.description: Path or URI to signature / attestation bundle, if applicable.

verified.description: Whether signature / attestation verification has succeeded before release-decision fold-in.

passed.description: Aggregate pass/fail result for this external summary.

reason.description: Optional human-readable reason for aggregate result.

release_contribution.description: Declared contribution mode. Required contribution only becomes release authority if promoted by declared PULSE policy.

authority_boundary.const: This external summary does not define release authority. It is recorded evidence that may be folded into status.json only after schema, identity, signer, and policy validation.

extensions.description: Optional non-normative extension fields for tool-specific metadata.
